requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Approval — Luminaires (CSA C22.2 No. 250 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全批准——灯具（CSA C22.2 No. 250 系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全批准——燈具（CSA C22.2 No. 250 系列）

summary.en: LED luminaires installed or sold for use in Canada generally require evidence of electrical equipment approval under provincial or territorial electrical safety law and the Canadian Electrical Code framework. The practical route is certification/listing by a certification body accredited by the Standards Council of Canada (SCC) for the relevant product scope. CSA C22.2 No. 250.0 covers luminaires; CSA C22.2 No. 250.13 covers LED equipment for lighting applications. The legal obligation is the Canadian electrical safety approval regime; the CSA C22.2 standards are the conformity route used by accredited certification bodies.
summary.zh: 在加拿大安装或销售使用的 LED 灯具，通常需要依据省或地区电气安全法律及加拿大电气规范体系取得电气设备批准证据。实际路径是由在相关产品范围内获得加拿大标准委员会（SCC）认可的认证机构进行认证/列名。CSA C22.2 No. 250.0 适用于灯具；CSA C22.2 No. 250.13 适用于照明用 LED 设备。强制义务来自加拿大电气安全批准制度；CSA C22.2 标准是认可认证机构采用的符合性路径。
summary.zht: 在加拿大安裝或銷售使用的 LED 燈具，通常需要依據省或地區電氣安全法律及加拿大電氣規範體系取得電氣設備批准證據。實際路徑是由在相關產品範圍內獲得加拿大標準委員會（SCC）認可的認證機構進行認證/列名。CSA C22.2 No. 250.0 適用於燈具；CSA C22.2 No. 250.13 適用於照明用 LED 設備。強制義務來自加拿大電氣安全批准制度；CSA C22.2 標準是認可認證機構採用的符合性路徑。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety approval regimes and Canadian Electrical Code adoption
CSA C22.2 No. 250.13 — Light emitting diode (LED) equipment for lighting applications
SCC accreditation for product, process and service certification bodies

summary.en: China's common equivalent is CCC certification for in-scope luminaires and GB 7000.1-2015 for general luminaire safety. CCC is administered under Chinese compulsory certification rules and relies on CNCA-designated certification and testing resources. A CCC certificate or GB test report does not demonstrate Canadian approval and cannot authorize a Canadian certification mark.
summary.zh: 中国常见对应路径为适用范围内灯具的 CCC 认证及 GB 7000.1-2015 通用灯具安全标准。CCC 按中国强制性产品认证规则实施，依赖 CNCA 指定的认证和检测资源。CCC 证书或 GB 检测报告不能证明加拿大批准，也不能授权使用加拿大认证标志。
summary.zht: 中國常見對應路徑為適用範圍內燈具的 CCC 認證及 GB 7000.1-2015 通用燈具安全標準。CCC 按中國強制性產品認證規則實施，依賴 CNCA 指定的認證和檢測資源。CCC 證書或 GB 檢測報告不能證明加拿大批准，也不能授權使用加拿大認證標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1-2015 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for lighting apparatus

gap.en: Canada expects a Canadian approval mark from an SCC-accredited certification body with the correct product scope; China CCC marks are not accepted as Canadian field approval or certification. Product construction, supply ratings, installation instructions, grounding, strain relief, temperature, polymeric enclosure, and marking reviews must be checked against the Canadian standard edition and Canadian deviations. Importers should verify that the certification body scope covers luminaires or LED lighting equipment before relying on a certificate.
gap.zh: 加拿大预期产品带有具备相应产品范围的 SCC 认可认证机构的加拿大批准标志；中国 CCC 标志不被视为加拿大现场批准或认证。产品结构、供电额定值、安装说明、接地、应力消除、温升、聚合物外壳及标志评审须按加拿大标准版本和加拿大差异进行核查。进口商在依赖证书前，应确认认证机构认可范围覆盖灯具或 LED 照明设备。
gap.zht: 加拿大預期產品帶有具備相應產品範圍的 SCC 認可認證機構的加拿大批准標誌；中國 CCC 標誌不被視為加拿大現場批准或認證。產品結構、供電額定值、安裝說明、接地、應力消除、溫升、聚合物外殼及標誌評審須按加拿大標準版本和加拿大差異進行核查。進口商在依賴證書前，應確認認證機構認可範圍覆蓋燈具或 LED 照明設備。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Canadian electrical equipment approval is required under provincial/territorial electrical safety regimes; certification by an SCC-accredited body is the normal market route for luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for in-scope domestic products — CCC certification may be required for luminaires under Chinese compulsory certification rules

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat CSA C22.2 No. 250 standards as the standalone mandatory obligation. The mandatory obligation is Canadian electrical equipment approval under the applicable jurisdiction; certification/listing by an SCC-accredited body to CSA C22.2 No. 250.0 or related LED lighting standards is the practical compliance route. China CCC does not replace Canadian approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】不应将 CSA C22.2 No. 250 标准本身表述为单独强制义务。强制义务是适用辖区下的加拿大电气设备批准；由 SCC 认可机构按 CSA C22.2 No. 250.0 或相关 LED 照明标准进行认证/列名是实际合规路径。中国 CCC 不能替代加拿大批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】不應將 CSA C22.2 No. 250 標準本身表述為單獨強制義務。強制義務是適用轄區下的加拿大電氣設備批准；由 SCC 認可機構按 CSA C22.2 No. 250.0 或相關 LED 照明標準進行認證/列名是實際合規路徑。中國 CCC 不能替代加拿大批准。
